testcase.classname: ProblemsService (integration) findAll should return seeded problems with string numeric fields
testcase.name: ProblemsService (integration) findAll should return seeded problems with string numeric fields

testcase.classname: ProblemsService (integration) findAll should filter by difficulty
testcase.name: ProblemsService (integration) findAll should filter by difficulty

testcase.classname: ProblemsService (integration) findOne should exclude hidden testcases from sample_test_cases (seeded Two Sum)
testcase.name: ProblemsService (integration) findOne should exclude hidden testcases from sample_test_cases (seeded Two Sum)

testcase.classname: ProblemsService (integration) findOne should throw NotFoundException for deleted/non-existent problems
testcase.name: ProblemsService (integration) findOne should throw NotFoundException for deleted/non-existent problems

testcase.classname: AuthService (integration) should login with seeded admin user
testcase.name: AuthService (integration) should login with seeded admin user

testcase.classname: AuthService (integration) should signup then login successfully (and cleanup)
testcase.name: AuthService (integration) should signup then login successfully (and cleanup)

testcase.classname: AuthService (integration) should throw ConflictException when username already exists
testcase.name: AuthService (integration) should throw ConflictException when username already exists

testcase.classname: AuthService (integration) should throw UnauthorizedException for wrong password
testcase.name: AuthService (integration) should throw UnauthorizedException for wrong password

testcase.classname: AuthService (integration) validateUserById should return non-sensitive fields only
testcase.name: AuthService (integration) validateUserById should return non-sensitive fields only

testcase.classname: UsersService (integration) findAll should include seeded users and return numeric fields as strings
testcase.name: UsersService (integration) findAll should include seeded users and return numeric fields as strings

testcase.classname: UsersService (integration) getSubmissionHistory should return seeded history for bob
testcase.name: UsersService (integration) getSubmissionHistory should return seeded history for bob

testcase.classname: UsersService (integration) getSubmissionHistory should throw NotFoundException for non-existent user
testcase.name: UsersService (integration) getSubmissionHistory should throw NotFoundException for non-existent user

testcase.classname: LeaderboardService (integration) getRankings should return seeded rankings in correct order (bob should be #1)
testcase.name: LeaderboardService (integration) getRankings should return seeded rankings in correct order (bob should be #1)
